lyte-code-snippet.description: A component to display code snippets with syntax highlighting, line numbers, and copy functionality.

methods.name: onBeforeCopy
methods.description: This callback is fired before the code is copied.

methods.name: onAfterCopy
methods.description: This callback is fired after the code is copied.

actions.name: alignCodeAndLineContainer
actions.description: This action will be called when the code snippet container is scrolled.

params.description: The scroll event triggered by the code snippet container.
params.name: event

actions.name: copyCode
actions.description: This action is triggered when the copy button is clicked.

ltPropCode.description: Defines the code snippet to be displayed.

ltPropType.description: Defines the type of code snippet (e.g., 'js', 'html', 'css').

ltPropLazyLoading.description: Enables lazy loading of code snippets, loading them in batches for performance.

ltPropShowCopyButton.description: Controls the visibility of the copy button for the code snippet.

ltPropShowLineNumber.description: Controls the visibility of line numbers in the code snippet.

ltPropEnableIndentation.description: Controls whether indentation is applied to the code snippet.

ltPropTitle.description: Defines the title of the code snippet, displayed above the code.

ltPropCopyMessagePreview.description: Controls whether a message preview is shown when the code is copied.

ltPropCopyMessageOnSuccess.description: The message displayed when the code is successfully copied to the clipboard.

ltPropCopyMessageOnFailure.description: The message displayed when the code copy operation fails.

ltPropCopyButtonAppearance.description: Defines the appearance of the copy button, such as 'text' or 'icon'.

ltPropCopyTooltipText.description: The tooltip text displayed when hovering over the copy button.

ltPropHeight.description: The height of the code snippet container, will be used as pixel.

ltPropEnableTypeWriting.description: Controls whether typewriting effect is enabled for the code snippet.

ltPropWrapCode.description: Controls whether the code snippet should wrap lines that exceed the container width.

ltPropTooltipConfig.description: Configuration object for the tooltip displayed on the copy button

ltPropTypeWriterController.description: Instance of the typewriter controller for managing typewriting effect.

functions.name: indentCode
functions.description: Locally control whether indentation has to be added or not

functions.name: createMessageBox
functions.description: Create the message box element if it doesn't already exist.

functions.name: syncLineNumbers
functions.description:
Synchronizes line numbers with wrapped code lines when ltPropWrapCode is enabled.

When code wrapping is enabled, long lines can span multiple visual lines, but the
line numbers should only appear on the first visual line of each actual code line.

This function:
1. Calculates how many visual lines each code line will occupy when wrapped
2. Creates line number elements that match the visual layout
3. Shows the line number only on the first visual line of each code line
4. Adds empty spacer elements for continuation lines to maintain alignment

The function handles:
- Dynamic container width changes
- Different font sizes and line heights
- Empty lines and varying line lengths
- Performance optimization through DOM fragment usage

functions.name: lazyLoader
functions.description: Controls whether lazy loading is enabled for code snippets.

functions.name: tokenizeAndBuild
functions.description: Tokenizes the code snippet based on its type and builds the snippet for display.

functions.name: buildLineNumbers
functions.description: Creates line numbers for the code snippet based on the total number of lines or a specified range.

functions.name: removeBuiltCode
functions.description: Removes the built code snippet from the container.

functions.name: adjustSize
functions.description: Adjusts the size of the code snippet container based on the height property.

functions.name: heightObserver
functions.description: Observes changes to the height property and adjusts the size of the code snippet container accordingly.

functions.name: displaySuccessMessage
functions.description: Displays a success message in the message box when the code is copied successfully.

functions.name: displayFailureMessage
functions.description: Displays a failure message in the message box when the code copy operation fails.

functions.name: handleResize
functions.description:
Handles window resize events to re-synchronize line numbers when wrapping is enabled.
This is important because window resizing can change how lines wrap.

functions.name: wrapCodeObserver
functions.description: Observes changes to the wrap code property and re-synchronizes line numbers accordingly.

lyte-table.description: Lyte-table is a component used to display data in rows and columns

methods.name: beforeRender
methods.description: This method is called before the table is rendered.

methods.name: afterRender
methods.description: This method is called after the table is rendered.

methods.name: scrollStart
methods.description: This method is called when the scroll reaches the start of the table.

methods.name: scrollEnd
methods.description: This method is called when the scroll reaches the end of the table.

methods.name: onBeforeSelect
methods.description: This method is called before a column is selected.

methods.name: onSelect
methods.description: This method is called after a column is selected.

methods.name: onDrag
methods.description: This method is called when a column is being dragged.

methods.name: onBeforeDrop
methods.description: This method is called before a column is dropped.

methods.name: onDrop
methods.description: This method is called after a column is dropped.

methods.name: onRelease
methods.description: This method is called after a column is released without any drag.

methods.name: onResizeMove
methods.description: This method is called while resizing a column.

methods.name: onResizeEnd
methods.description: This method is called after resizing a column.

methods.name: onBeforeResizeSelect
methods.description: This method is called before selecting a column for resize.

methods.name: onResizeSelect
methods.description: This method is called after selecting a column for resize.

methods.name: onUnFix
methods.description: This method is called when a fixed column is unfixed.

methods.name: onFix
methods.description: This method is called when a column is fixed.

methods.name: onFakeColumnCreate
methods.description: This method is called when a placeholder element is created for column sorting.

methods.name: onBeforeInterChange
methods.description: This method is called before interchanging columns during sorting.

methods.name: onInterChange
methods.description: This method is called after interchanging columns during sorting.

methods.description: This method is invoked whenever you try to delete a tab by clicking on the close icon or by invoking the deleteTab method. If returned false form the method the sepecified tab wont be deleted.

methods.description: This method is invoked after a tab is deleted either by clicking on the close icon or by invoking the deleteTab method

methods.name: onAfterMenuRender

methods.description: This callback is fired when a menu item is selected.If returned false, selected option won't apply.

methods.name: onBeforePrefetch
methods.description: This callback is fired before fetching the video file when prefetch enabled,returing false wont fetch that file.

methods.name: onPrefetchSuccess
methods.description: This callback is fired before after fetching the video file when prefetch enabled.

methods.name: onPrefetchError
methods.description: This callback is fired if prefetch is failed.

methods.description: This callback is fired after the video ended.
